Harold & Kumar Go to White Castle (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $18,225,165Details
International Box Office $1,249,387
Worldwide Box Office $19,474,552
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,480,378 (30.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.33 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$9,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,135 opening theaters/2,163 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $35,100,316

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 30th, 2004 (Wide) by New Line
International Releases: September 23rd, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: January 4th, 2005 by New Line Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong language, sexual content, drug use and some crude humor
Running Time: 88 minutes
Franchise: Harold & Kumar
Cast, crew, or production detail: Fictionalized Version of Yourself
Plot point: Narcotics, Road Trip
Subgenre: Stoner Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Senator Entertainment, Kingsgate Films, Endgame Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
